rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>你好啊，小哥，<unk[5:1]>
是打算去鼓隆城吗？
自从死亡之山停止喷发，
那儿确实可以轻松前往了呢。
只是到鼓隆城附近为止
都是陡斜的山路，
出发之前如果不做好准备，
很快就会筋疲力尽哦。
<unk[3:0:261]>不过，<unk[5:0]>只要喝下<Color=red>用精力蚱蜢制成的药<Color=white>，
<Color=red>疲劳就会马上恢复<Color=white>……<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:8]>所以说啊，
你要买些精力蚱蜢再走吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>嘿，這位小哥，<unk[5:1]>
你是要去鼓隆城嗎？
自從死亡之山停止噴發後，
隨時都能去那了呢。
但是到鼓隆城以前的山路
都非常陡峭，
沒做好準備的話，
很快就會累癱喔。
<unk[3:0:261]>不過呢……<unk[5:0]>只要喝下<Color=red>用精力蚱蜢製成的藥<Color=white>，
就能<Color=red>立即消除疲勞<Color=white>。<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:8]>正好我這裡有販售精力蚱蜢，<unk[5:0]>
你要不要買一點呀？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>おう <Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃん<unk[5:1]>
ゴロンシティにでも お<Ruby={2:2}で>出かけかい？
デスマウンテンの<Ruby={4:6}ふんか>噴火が <Ruby={2:4}おさ>収まって<Ruby={4:6}いらい>以来
<Ruby={4:6}きがる>気軽に<Ruby={2:2}い>行けるようになったもんな
とはいえ ゴロンシティの<Ruby={2:4}あた>辺りまでは
<Ruby={4:8}けいしゃ>傾斜のきつい<Ruby={4:8}やまみち>山道だ
<Ruby={4:8}じゅんび>準備していかないと
すぐに バテちまうだろうよ
<unk[3:0:261]>まあ <unk[5:0]><Color=red>ガンバリバッタで<Ruby={2:4}つく>作った<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}の>飲めば
<Color=red>バテも すぐに<Ruby={4:8}かいふく>回復<Color=white>だけどな…<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:8]>ってなわけで ガンバリバッタ
<Ruby={2:2}か>買ってかないか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Hey there, friend. You on your way to
Goron City?

Ever since Death Mountain's eruptions
stopped, getting there is so easy, any
Hylian can make the trek.
Still, walking up that steep mountain road
can really take it out of you if you're not
adequately prepared.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:261]>Buuut, <unk[5:0]>if you drink an <Color=red>elixir made with
restless crickets<Color=white>, you can <Color=red>recover from
exhaustion right away<Color=white>!
<unk[3:0:8]>And what a handy coincidence <unk[5:0]>that I sell
restless crickets! So, what do you say?

<unk[3:0:7]>只要喝下<Color=red>用精力蚱蜢制成的药<Color=white>，
<Color=red>疲劳就会马上恢复<Color=white>。
准备充足是旅行的基础！<unk[5:1]>
怎么样，要看看吗？<unk[5:0]>

drink of a <Color=red>restless-cricket-filled elixir<Color=white> will
<Color=red>perk you right up<Color=white>.
I never travel without it! <unk[5:1]>Now, can I
interest you in some crickets?<unk[5:0]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>你好啊，小哥，<unk[5:0]>是来这里泡温泉的吗？<unk[5:1]>
这附近的温泉很不错哦～
说到温泉……<unk[5:1]>
小哥你喜欢吃<Color=red>水煮蛋<Color=white>吗？
只要把<Color=red>禽蛋<Color=white>放入温泉，
稍微过一会儿就煮好啦。
<unk[3:0:8]>粘稠的蛋黄特别美味，<unk[5:1]>
如果你要去泡温泉，就一定要尝试一下。
<unk[3:0:257]>我这里也出售禽蛋，<unk[5:1]>
怎么样，要看看吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>嘿，小哥，<unk[5:0]>你是來泡溫泉的嗎？<unk[5:1]>

說到溫泉……<unk[5:1]>

稍等一下後就能煮好喔。
<unk[3:0:8]>那鮮美的黏稠蛋黃，真是令人無法抗拒，<unk[5:1]>
如果你要去泡溫泉，請務必試試看喔。
<unk[3:0:257]>我這裡也有販售禽蛋喔，<unk[5:0]>

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>おう <Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃん<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={4:8}おんせん>温泉にでも<Ruby={2:4}はい>入りに<Ruby={2:2}き>来たのかい？<unk[5:1]>
この<Ruby={2:4}あた>辺りの<Ruby={4:8}おんせん>温泉は いい<Ruby={2:2}ゆ>湯だよな～
<Ruby={4:8}おんせん>温泉といえば… <unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃんは <Color=red>ゆでタマゴ<Color=white><Ruby={2:2}す>好きかい？
<Color=red>トリのタマゴ<Color=white>を <Ruby={4:8}おんせん>温泉に<Ruby={2:2}い>入れて
しばらくしたら はいできあがり

トリのタマゴは ウチでも<Ruby={2:6}あつか>扱ってるけど
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Heya, friend! <unk[5:0]>You here to soak in the
hot springs? Excellent choice.<PageBreak>Speaking of excellent choices...<unk[5:1]> Do you
like <Color=red>hard-boiled eggs<Color=white>?<PageBreak>Just toss a <Color=red>bird egg<Color=white> in a hot spring,
wait a little while, and poof! A perfect
hard-boiled egg every time.
<unk[3:0:8]>Those delicious gooey yolks are to die for.<unk[5:1]>
Give it a try! The other patrons won't mind
a few eggs in the water.
<unk[3:0:257]>Wondering where to get bird eggs?<unk[5:1]> Well,
wonder no more! Because I sell 'em.

<unk[3:0:263]>And wow, it just so happens<unk[5:0]> that I sell

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>雨天可真讨厌啊～

峭壁被雨水淋湿，攀爬时不就会更容易滑落吗？<unk[5:1]>
一滑一滑的……很令人伤脑筋呢……
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>这时候，<unk[5:1]>只要喝下<Color=red>用贴贴青蛙煮成的药<Color=white>，
<Color=red>就不容易打滑了<Color=white>，<unk[5:0]>特别神奇哦！
我这里也出售贴贴青蛙，<unk[5:0]>
怎么样，要看看吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>雨天真是討人厭啊～

一旦被淋濕了，爬牆時就會很容易滑落吧？<unk[5:1]>
滑滑的真讓人傷腦筋呢。
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>不過，<unk[5:1]>這時只要喝下以<Color=red>貼貼青蛙熬煮的藥<Color=white>，
哇～太神奇啦，<unk[5:0]><Color=red>變得不容易滑掉<Color=white>囉。
我這裡也有販售貼貼青蛙喔，<unk[5:0]>
有沒有興趣呀？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨は<Ruby={2:4}いや>嫌だね～

<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れると <Ruby={2:4}かべ>壁で<Ruby={2:4}すべ>滑りやすくなるだろう？<unk[5:1]>
ツルッ ツルッとして<Ruby={2:4}こま>困るよな
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>そこでだ<unk[5:1]> <Color=red>ハリツキガエルを<Ruby={4:4}につ>煮詰めた<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}の>飲むと
あら<Ruby={6:6}ふしぎ>不思議 <unk[5:0]><Color=red><Ruby={2:4}すべ>滑りづらくなる<Color=white>のよ
どうだい？<unk[5:0]>
ハリツキガエルは ウチでも<Ruby={2:6}あつか>扱ってるけど
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>The rain always gets me down...<PageBreak>The worst part is the slick surfaces.<unk[5:1]>
A few drops of rain and I start slipping
and sliding off of walls.
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>But there's a solution!<unk[5:1]> <Color=red>Boil some sticky
frogs into an elixir<Color=white>, take a swig, and just
like that, you'll start <Color=red>slipping less<Color=white>.
Wherever will you find sticky frogs?<unk[5:0]> Why,
right here, in my pack! So, how many can
I put you down for?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>只要喝下<Color=red>用贴贴青蛙煮成的药<Color=white>，
即使峭壁被雨水淋湿，攀爬时也不会轻易打滑哦。
遇上现在这种天气，
少不得要用到～
<unk[3:0:1]>来来，我这里也出售贴贴青蛙，<unk[5:1]>
怎么样，要看看吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>喝下<Color=red>以貼貼青蛙熬煮的藥<Color=white>後，
即使被雨淋濕，爬牆時也很難滑落吧？
那種藥在這種天氣
是必備品啊～
<unk[3:0:1]>我這裡也有販售貼貼青蛙喔，<unk[5:1]>
有沒有興趣呀？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red>ハリツキガエルを<Ruby={4:4}につ>煮詰めた<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}の>飲むと
<Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨で<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れてても <Ruby={2:4}かべ>壁で<Ruby={2:4}すべ>滑りづらくなるだろ？
こんな<Ruby={4:6}てんき>天気の<Ruby={2:4}とき>時にゃ
<Ruby={2:2}か>欠かせないよなぁ～
<unk[3:0:1]>さ どうだい？<unk[5:1]>
ハリツキガエルは ウチでも<Ruby={2:6}あつか>扱ってるけど
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>If you drink an <Color=red>elixir of boiled sticky frogs<Color=white>,
you'll hardly ever slip—even in the
pouring rain!
They're a real must in this weather.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:1]>It'd sure be handy if you knew someone
who sold sticky frogs...<unk[5:1]> Oh, wait, that's
me! So how 'bout it?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>你好啊，小哥，是去拉聂尔地区旅行吗？<unk[5:0]>
那你就一定要小心了。
最近在拉聂尔地区那里，
似乎会从天上掉下被称作<Color=red>淤泥<Color=white>的黑色块状物体。
据说那东西黏糊糊的，非常恶心，
但是<Color=red>用水冲洗<Color=white>就能洗干净。
<unk[3:0:8]>也就是说呀……<unk[5:1]>
只要随身携带<Color=red>水之果<Color=white>，就没有任何问题！
我这里也出售水之果，<unk[5:0]>
怎么样，要看看吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>這位小哥，你打算去拉聶爾地區旅行嗎？<unk[5:0]>
那麼你就要多加小心了……
最近在拉聶爾地區，
好像有種被稱作<Color=red>淤泥<Color=white>的黑色塊狀物會從天上掉下來。
聽說那東西既黏稠又噁心，
不過<Color=red>用水清洗<Color=white>就能洗乾淨了。
<unk[3:0:8]>也就是說……<unk[5:1]>
只要帶著<Color=red>水之果<Color=white>就沒問題啦！
我這裡也有販售水之果喔，<unk[5:0]>
有沒有興趣呀？
rows.JPja:

しかし <Ruby={2:2}き>気をつけねぇといけねぇよ
<Ruby={4:8}さいきん>最近ラネール<Ruby={4:6}ちほう>地方じゃ <Color=red>ヘドロ<Color=white>っていう<Ruby={2:4}くろ>黒い<Ruby={2:8}かたまり>塊が
<Ruby={2:4}そら>空から<Ruby={2:2}ふ>降ってきているらしい
ベトベトして<Ruby={4:4}きも>気持ち<Ruby={2:4}わる>悪いものらしいが
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}みず>水で<Ruby={2:4}なが>流せば <Color=white>キレイさっぱりって<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話だ

<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}みず>水の<Ruby={2:2}み>実<Color=white>さえ<Ruby={2:2}も>持ってれば <Ruby={8:14}ばんじかいけつ>万事解決ってわけよ！
どうだい？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}みず>水の<Ruby={2:2}み>実は ウチでも<Ruby={2:6}あつか>扱ってるけど
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Hello, hello, friend! Making your way to
Lanayru?<unk[5:0]> Then tread carefully.<PageBreak>Word is, these blackish clumps of <Color=red>sludge<Color=white>
have been falling all over the region.<PageBreak>It's really sticky and gross if the sludge
lands on you, but thankfully you can
<Color=red>wash it off with water<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:8]>In other words...<unk[5:1]>everything will turn out
fine as long as you have a healthy supply
of <Color=red>splash fruit<Color=white> on hand!
And if you don't have a healthy supply...<unk[5:0]>
I sell splash fruit! Need to restock?

<unk[3:0:8]>そこでだ <Color=red>ハリツキガエルを<Ruby={4:4}につ>煮詰めた<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}の>飲むと
あら<Ruby={6:6}ふしぎ>不思議 <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}すべ>滑りづらくなる<Color=white>ってわけさ

ハリツキガエルは ウチでも<Ruby={2:6}あつか>扱ってるけど
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Hm? <unk[5:1]>Friend, something tells me that you
may be Lanayru-bound.

Lanayru's home to a lot of caves, and
most of their walls are wet and slippery.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:8]>If you want to make sure your climbing
<Color=red>grip rarely slips<Color=white>, simply knock back an
<Color=red>elixir made of boiled sticky frogs<Color=white>.
And as luck would have it...<unk[5:0]>I sell sticky
frogs for all your elixiring needs! Care to
buy a few?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>只要喝下<Color=red>用贴贴青蛙煮成的药<Color=white>，
即使在湿漉漉的峭壁上<Color=red>也不会轻易滑落<Color=white>对吧？
所以说旅行的时候怎么能少了它呢～<PageBreak>我这里也出售贴贴青蛙，<unk[5:0]>
怎么样，要看看吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>喝下<Color=red>以貼貼青蛙熬煮的藥<Color=white>後，
即使攀爬濕潤的牆壁也<Color=red>沒那麼容易滑落了<Color=white>吧？
那種藥在旅途當中可是必備品啊～<PageBreak>我這裡也有販售貼貼青蛙喔，<unk[5:0]>
有沒有興趣呀？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red>ハリツキガエルを<Ruby={4:4}につ>煮詰めた<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}の>飲むと
<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れてる<Ruby={2:4}かべ>壁でも <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}すべ>滑りづらくなる<Color=white>だろ？
<Ruby={2:4}たび>旅には <Ruby={2:2}か>欠かせないよなぁ～<PageBreak>どうだい？<unk[5:0]>
ハリツキガエルは ウチでも<Ruby={2:6}あつか>扱ってるけど
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>If you drink an <Color=red>elixir made by boiling
sticky frogs<Color=white>, you'll <Color=red>slip less<Color=white> on walls,
even when they're wet!
It's a travel essential if ever there
was one!<PageBreak>Fresh out of sticky frogs to elixirize? <unk[5:0]>
Never fear, my pack is here!

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:263]><Ruby={2:4}ほか>他にも<Ruby={2:4}なに>何か<Ruby={2:2}か>買ってくかい？

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Many thanks, friend! <unk[5:0]>Is there anything
else you want to sell me?
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Got anything else for me to buy?
<unk[3:0:10]>I see... <unk[5:1]>I got my hopes up too.

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:263]><Ruby={2:4}なん>何でも <Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:2}と>取るからな！

rows.USen: <unk[3:0:263]>Sell me as much as you'd like!

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:263]><Ruby={4:8}いろいろ>色々 <Ruby={2:2}う>売ってくれよな！

rows.USen: <unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>There are no wrong choices at my shop!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]><Ruby={2:4}わる>悪いな……<unk[5:1]>
それは<Ruby={2:4}いま>今 <Ruby={2:2}う>売り<Ruby={2:2}き>切れ<Ruby={2:6}ちゅう>中だ……
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>Oh, wait, sorry...<unk[5:1]> That's sold out for now.
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>You're a little short on rupees, there.<unk[5:1]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>你的袋子似乎满了呢……<unk[5:1]>
等你给袋子整理出空间再来吧。

<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>你的袋子似乎裝滿了呢……<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>ポーチが いっぱいのようだな……<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>Looks like your pouch is fuller than we
thought.<unk[5:1]> Make a little space in there, and
come back soon!
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>That one has my seal of approval!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]><Ruby={4:6}じまん>自慢の<Ruby={2:4}しな>品ぞろえだ！<unk[5:1]>
ゆっくり <Ruby={2:2}み>見てってくれ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>All my items come highly recommended.<unk[5:1]>
By me! Take your time browsing.
<unk[3:0:0]>How many would you like to sell?

rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:12]>这件物品……我这里不能收购呢……
rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:12]>それはちょっと ウチでは<Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:2}と>取れないな～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>I always say I can buy anything, but
you've found the exception...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>我可不能收购你穿在身上的服装！
请你先脱下来再卖给我吧！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>我沒辦法收購你穿在身上的服裝喔！
等脫下後再賣給我吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]><Ruby={2:2}き>着ている<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服は <Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:2}と>取れないよ！
<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>脱いでから<Ruby={2:2}う>売ってくれ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>I can't buy the clothes off your back!
Get changed, and then we'll talk.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>这种天气就应该给客人特别服务！
我会将平时不拿出来的商品也摆出来卖哦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>在這種天氣時就該給客人特別服務！
我會將平時沒賣的商品也擺出來賣喔！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>こんな<Ruby={4:6}てんき>天気の<Ruby={2:2}ひ>日はサービスだ！
<Ruby={4:6}ふだん>普段は<Ruby={2:2}だ>出さない<Ruby={4:10}しょうひん>商品も <Ruby={2:2}だ>出すからな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>On lousy-weather days like these, I stock
special products to put some sun back in
your skies!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>托小哥你的福，今天卖完了！
真的谢谢你买了我那么多东西！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>多虧小哥，今天銷售一空了！
真是非常感謝！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃんのおかげで <Ruby={4:8}ほんじつ>本日は<Ruby={4:8}かんばい>完売だ！
たくさん<Ruby={2:2}か>買ってくれて <Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に ありがとよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>I'm all sold out for the day thanks to you!
You're not just an eager customer but a
true friend!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>感谢惠顾。
托你的福，今天的商品都卖完了。<unk[5:1]>
虽然已经没有商品了，
不过你要看看预定进货的东西吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>感謝惠顧～
多虧有你，今天的貨全賣完啦。<unk[5:1]>
雖然已經沒有任何商品了，
不過你要看看預定進貨的品項嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:6}まいど>毎度 ありがとうな
おかげ<Ruby={2:4}さま>様で <Ruby={4:6}きょう>今日の<Ruby={2:4}ぶん>分は<Ruby={4:8}かんばい>完売だ<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:10}しょうひん>商品は もう<Ruby={2:4}なに>何も<Ruby={2:4}のこ>残ってないけど
<Ruby={8:14}にゅうかよてい>入荷予定の<Ruby={2:4}しな>品など <Ruby={2:2}み>見ていくかい？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I appreciate your business. Thanks to you,
I'm all sold out for the day!<unk[5:1]>

I don't have anything left to sell, but
you're welcome to look at what I plan
on stocking!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>如果你还想买什么东西，
随时欢迎再来！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>要是還有想要的東西，
歡迎隨時再來啊！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>また<Ruby={2:4}なに>何か<Ruby={2:2}ほ>欲しい<Ruby={2:4}もの>物があったら
いつでも <Ruby={2:2}き>来てくんな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>If you ever need anything, my door is
always open! Metaphorically, at least.

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:8]><Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃん <Ruby={2:4}たす>助かったよ！
<unk[3:0:8]>ありがとよ！ <Ruby={2:4}あや>危うく<Ruby={4:4}けが>怪我する<Ruby={2:6}ところ>所だったよ！

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>小哥你可真厉害啊！<unk[5:0]>
要是再年轻个几岁，我也……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>小哥你真強啊！<unk[5:0]>
要是我也能再年輕個幾歲的話……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃん <Ruby={2:4}つよ>強いんだな！<unk[5:0]>
ワシも もう<Ruby={2:4}すこ>少し<Ruby={2:4}わか>若けりゃねぇ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>You're pretty strong, friend!<unk[5:0]> You remind
me of me back in the day.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>呼～多亏了小哥你，
搬运马车也平安无事！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>呼～託小哥的福，
搬運馬車也沒事喔！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ふ～っ <Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃんのおかげで

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>Phew! Thanks to you, both my cart and I

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>居然能打倒那么强的怪物……

rows.TWzh:

rows.JPja:

<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃん ほんとにすごいな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>That was a real humdinger of a monster.
You really are amazing, friend!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>哎呀～真是太感谢你了！<unk[5:0]>
要是没有小哥，真不知道我现在成了什么样。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>哇～真是謝謝小哥啦！<unk[5:0]>
要是你不在的話，真不知道我現在會怎樣呢。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>いや～ ほんとにありがとよ！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃんがいなかったら <Ruby={4:8}いまごろ>今頃どうなってたか
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>Wow, I can't thank you enough! <unk[5:0]>If you
weren't here, then... Well, let's not think

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:9]>あっち<Ruby={2:2}い>行け！ <Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物め！

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76]>なんで こんな<Ruby={2:2}め>目にあわなきゃならんのだ…

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76]>Why did this have to happen to me?
Run, friend! Run for your life!

rows.USen: <unk[3:0:1]>This is to show my gratitude. So take it!
